rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes at valid scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in scope.
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric encodings of event ports or opaque data types.
Ensure AGREE annex content aligns with the authoritative AADL model structure.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings must be placed in component implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports.
